# Managing a Subscription

Subscription management allows users to pause, skip, or reschedule their subscriptions through the subscriptions tab in their account. Any modifications made at least two days prior to the next scheduled charge will take effect immediately. Cancelling a subscription prevents future charges but does not result in a refund for any shipments that have already been billed.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#managing-a-subscription]
